overview: Anurag Engineering College at Ananthagiri, Suryapet district, was established in 2001 by Amartya Educational Society to bring engineering education closer to rural students. The official site describes it as a not-for-profit, UGC autonomous engineering college with a 30-acre green campus and strong placement-focused training.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous Institution; AICTE approved; permanently affiliated to JNTUH; NBA-accredited programs.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Civil, CSE, CSE (AI and ML), IT, ECE, EEE

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Fee details are not displayed on the public fee page
Fee details are not displayed on the public fee page

admissions.admissionProcess: The college states that Category-A admissions are through Telangana centralized counseling for TG EAPCET, TG ECET, TG PGECET/GATE, and TG ICET as applicable. Category-B admissions are handled by the college management based on merit in the relevant qualifying examination.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET, TG ECET, TG PGECET, and TG ICET schedules are published by Telangana authorities each cycle; the college separately posts Category-B notifications and admission updates.

campus.specialNote: The examination branch notes that the college has been functioning with UGC autonomy since 2014.

contact.address: Ananthagiri (V and M), Suryapet District - 508206, Telangana, India
